hero.imageAlt: Aerial drone photograph of a freshly shingled Pacific Northwest craftsman home surrounded by cedar trees in late-afternoon light
hero.badge: Bainbridge Island · North Seattle · GAF Master Elite · Est. 2019
hero.headline: A Roof, Permanently.

intro.label: A roofing studio, not a bid mill
intro.body: Thirty-year roof systems, properly installed. GAF Master Elite-certified crews, honest inspections, and active storm response for Bainbridge Island and North Seattle — from the first leak to the final ridge cap.

personas.label: Residential Replacement
personas.kicker: For the roof you'll hand down

personas.label: Storm & Repair
personas.kicker: For the weather that finds a weakness

personas.label: Inspection & Maintenance
personas.kicker: For the roof you want to last

configuratorTeaser.headline: Get a written roof estimate in under a minute.
configuratorTeaser.body: Answer four questions about your home and our virtual estimator returns a transparent price range for repair or replacement — plus material options (architectural shingle vs. metal) — before a single sales call.

zPatternRows.label: System, Not Shingles
zPatternRows.headline: A roof is not shingles. It's a system.
zPatternRows.body: Underlayment, ice-and-water barrier, drip edge, step flashing, ridge ventilation, fastener schedule — the shingles are the last 10%. A properly installed system outlasts a premium shingle poorly installed, every time. We build systems, and we build them to manufacturer spec.

zPatternRows.label: Honest Assessment
zPatternRows.headline: We'd rather repair it than oversell it.
zPatternRows.body: Most roofing calls don't need a new roof. They need a proper inspection, a clear diagnosis, and a repair scoped to the actual problem. If we can fix it for $700, we'll tell you. If it's time for a replacement, you'll see the evidence — photographed, written, and explained.

zPatternRows.label: Storm Response
zPatternRows.headline: When the storm hits, we're already on the way.
zPatternRows.body: Every wind event activates the storm-response team. Emergency tarp, damage photography, and insurance-claim-ready documentation — same day for active leaks. Because a compromised roof at 11pm is a right-now problem, not a next-Tuesday problem.

zPatternRows.label: The Warranty
zPatternRows.headline: GAF Golden Pledge, backed by 25 years of workmanship.
zPatternRows.body: Full replacements qualify for the GAF Golden Pledge — the strongest shingle warranty in North America, available only to the top 2% of contractors. Every install carries a 25-year workmanship guarantee. The materials last because the installation earns the right to let them.

footerCta.headline: Ready for a roof that'll still be here in thirty years?
footerCta.subhead: We'll be in touch within a few hours to schedule a walkthrough.
